lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who meditate on God.
lovingly centering your consciousness on the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਨਿ ਬੁਝੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jalan bujhai har har gun gaavat |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The fire of desire is quenched, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, enshrine love for the Lord. ||2||
One's life become fruitful and rewarding, by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਧਨੁ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਅਨੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: mat pat dhan sukh sehaj anandaa |
lines.english: Wisdom, honor, wealth, peace and celestial bliss are attained,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਮਨਿ ਪਿਆਸ ਘਨੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har darasan kee man piaas ghaneree |
lines.english: My mind is so very thirsty for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.
If one does not forget the Lord of supreme bliss, even for an instant. ||3||
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
Prays Nanak, O God, I seek Your Sanctuary. ||4||8||13||
I am worthless, totally lacking all virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੋਪਾਲਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: meraa man tan har gopaal suhaaeaa |
lines.english: My mind and body are embellished by the Lord, the Lord of the World.
Bless me with Your Mercy, and make me Your Own. ||1||
Now, I have been carried across the world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh ghar meh aaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Granting His Mercy, God has come into the home of my heart. ||1||Pause||
He is the Lover and Protector of His devotees, the Destroyer of fear.
I have seen the Supreme Lord with my eyes. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਬੇਦਿ ਲੇਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: patit paavan prabh birad bed lekhiaa |
lines.english: It is God's Way to purify sinners, say the Vedas.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Lord becomes manifest.
Who can know the value of serving You, God?
O slave Nanak, all pains are relieved. ||4||9||14||
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
The Mansion of God, my Lord and Master, is lofty and high.
God is imperishable, invisible and incomprehensible. ||1||
His Glorious Virtues are infinite; God is profound and unfathomable.
There is no other than the One Lord.
You alone know Your worship and adoration. ||2||
You are unlimited, O my Lord and Master. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis prabh devai so naam paaee |3|
lines.english: He alone obtains the Naam, the Name of the Lord, unto whom God bestows it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jo jan prabh bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, that humble being who pleases God,
No one can do anything by himself, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੧੦॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan prabh tin hee paaeaa |4|10|15|
lines.english: he alone finds God, the treasure of virtue. ||4||10||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਮਹਿ ਹਾਥ ਦੇ ਰਾਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: maat garabh meh haath de raakhiaa |
lines.english: Extending His Hand, the Lord protected you in your mother's womb.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
Meditate, vibrate on the Lord of the Universe, and renounce all entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har ras chhodd bikhiaa fal chaakhiaa |1|
lines.english: Renouncing the sublime essence of the Lord, you have tasted the fruit of poison. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਜਮੁ ਆਇ ਸੰਘਾਰੈ ਮੂੜੇ ਤਬ ਤਨੁ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਬੇਹਾਲ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jab jam aae sanghaarai moorre tab tan binas jaae behaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When the Messenger of Death comes to murder you, O fool, then your body will be shattered and helplessly crumble. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਕਰਿ ਥਾਪਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tan man dhan apanaa kar thaapiaa |
lines.english: You hold onto your body, mind and wealth as your own,
You have fallen into the deep, dark pit of great attachment.
Caught in the illusion of Maya, you have forgotten the Supreme Lord. ||3||
and you do not meditate on the Creator Lord, even for an instant. ||2||
By great good fortune, one sings the Kirtan of God's Praises.
In the Society of the Saints, Nanak has found God. ||4||11||16||
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
- O Nanak, the Supreme Lord is our help and support. ||1||
Mother, father, children, relatives and siblings

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪੂਰੀ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਅਨਿਕ ਗੁਣਾ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਜਾਹਿ ਨ ਗਣੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa pooree jaa kee baanee anik gunaa jaa ke jaeh na gane |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Perfect is the Bani, the Word of the Perfect Guru. His Virtues are so many, they cannot be counted. ||1||Pause||
He blesses us with peace, and abundant celestial bliss.
Meditating on God, desires are fulfilled. ||2||
God Himself makes all arrangements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਥ ਧਰਮ ਕਾਮ ਮੋਖ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: arath dharam kaam mokh kaa daataa |
lines.english: He is the Giver of wealth, Dharmic faith, pleasure and liberation.
